name: dingtalk-hybrid-desktop
description: Electron desktop shell for DingTalk automatic check-in console

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 concurrently -k -n renderer,backend,electron -c cyan,magenta,green "npm --prefix ../frontend run dev" "python3 ../backend/api_server.py" "wait-on tcp:5173 http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health && electron ."
scripts.dist: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --publish never
